mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals robust manufacturing activity, which drives corporate earnings growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO rises by > 1.5% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank tightening expectations, reducing equity valuations and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL exceeding 240.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate a tightening cycle amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity markets and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in > 50% of cases where both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL exceed their respective thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles (FEDFUNDS > 2.0%) reduce liquidity, increasing discount rates and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods when FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment (UNRATE > 6.0%) signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing consumer spending and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand, driving corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of cases where both HOUST and RSAFS exceed their respective thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in consumer spending (RSAFS) drives corporate earnings, creating positive momentum in the S&P 500 over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of periods when RSAFS grows by > 1.0% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, rising housing starts (HOUST) signal overheating demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns as markets anticipate policy tightening.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1100.
